name: Gobi Ka- Gingery Cauliflower Soup - India
recipeIngredient: 1-inch piece fresh ginger, peeled and slivered
2 medium potatoes, peeled, cut into 1-inch cubes
recipeInstructions:
1. Set the oil over medium-high heat in a good-sized saucepan.
2. When hot, add onion, ginger, and garlic. Stir-fry for about 4 minutes or until onion is slightly browned.
3. Add cumin, coriander, turmeric, and cayenne. Stir once.
4. Add potato, cauliflower, and chicken stock. Stir and bring to a boil.
5. Reduce heat to low and cover. Simmer gently for 10 minutes or until potatoes are tender.
6. Transfer soup into a blender and blend or use a hand blender to purée.
7. Add cream and gently reheat.
